name: Scroll
description: Scroll is a zkEVM Layer 2 solution for Ethereum. Early users bridging and transacting may qualify for future airdrops.

steps.title: Bridge to Scroll
steps.description: Use the official Scroll bridge to transfer ETH from Ethereum mainnet. Start with 0.01 ETH minimum.

steps.title: Swap on Scroll DEXs
steps.description: Trade on native DEXs like Skydrome or Ambient to generate transaction volume.

steps.title: Use Scroll Ecosystem Apps
steps.description: Interact with lending protocols, NFT marketplaces, or mint a Scroll Name Service domain.
steps.tips: Diversify activity across different dApp categories

risks: Sybil detection may exclude obvious farmers

name: Base
description: Base is Coinbase's Ethereum Layer 2. While no official airdrop confirmed, active ecosystem users may benefit from future incentives.
requirements: Bridge to Base via official bridge

steps.title: Bridge ETH to Base
steps.description: Use the official Base bridge or Coinbase wallet for easy onboarding.

steps.title: Swap on BaseSwap or Aerodrome
steps.description: Trade tokens on Base's main DEXs to generate activity.

steps.title: Mint an NFT or use SocialFi
steps.description: Explore Base ecosystem: mint on Zora, use Friend.tech (if available), or try Base Name Service.
steps.tips: Coinbase-backed projects often reward early users

name: Arbitrum Odyssey
description: Arbitrum Odyssey campaigns reward users exploring the ecosystem. Participate in weekly challenges to earn NFT badges and potential future rewards.

steps.title: Check Odyssey schedule
steps.description: Visit the official Arbitrum Odyssey page to see current and upcoming week challenges.

steps.title: Complete weekly tasks
steps.description: Each week focuses on different protocols: DEXs, NFT markets, lending, bridges. Complete tasks to earn badges.

steps.title: Collect all badges
steps.description: Accumulate as many NFT badges as possible. Higher participation may lead to better rewards.

risks: Costs add up across multiple weeks

name: Optimism Quests
description: Optimism runs periodic quest campaigns to boost ecosystem engagement. Complete quests for on-chain attestations and potential retroactive rewards.

steps.title: Bridge to Optimism
steps.description: Use the official Optimism bridge to move ETH from Ethereum.

steps.title: Find active quests
steps.description: Check Galxe, Layer3, or official Optimism channels for current quest campaigns.

steps.title: Complete quest tasks
steps.description: Tasks usually involve swapping, providing liquidity, voting on governance, or using specific dApps.
steps.tips: Quests are often time-limited, act quickly

name: MetaMask Snaps
description: MetaMask Snaps extend wallet functionality. Early adopters testing Snaps may qualify if MetaMask launches a token.

steps.title: Install MetaMask Flask
steps.description: Download Flask, the experimental MetaMask version that supports Snaps.

steps.title: Browse and install Snaps
steps.description: Explore the Snaps directory and install different categories: notifications, transaction insights, multi-chain support.

steps.title: Use Snaps regularly
steps.description: Interact with installed Snaps when making transactions or managing assets.

name: Manta Pacific
description: Manta Pacific is a modular L2 for zero-knowledge applications. Users participating in ecosystem activities may receive MANTA token rewards.

steps.title: Bridge assets to Manta
steps.description: Use the official Manta bridge to move ETH from Ethereum.

steps.title: Swap on Manta DEXs
steps.description: Trade tokens on ApertureSwap or other Manta-native DEXs.
steps.tips: Generate volume but watch gas costs

steps.title: Explore zkNFTs and privacy apps
steps.description: Manta specializes in zero-knowledge tech. Try minting zkNFTs or using privacy-focused dApps.

name: Blast
description: Blast is an Ethereum L2 with native yield on ETH and stablecoins. Early depositors and ecosystem users earn Blast Points for potential rewards.
requirements: Bridge ETH or stablecoins to Blast
Use Blast dApps to boost points

steps.title: Bridge to Blast
steps.description: Deposit ETH or stablecoins via the official Blast bridge. You'll earn automatic yield while on Blast.

steps.title: Accumulate Blast Points
steps.description: Points accrue automatically based on your deposit balance and time. Use Blast dApps to earn bonus points.

steps.title: Use Blast ecosystem dApps
steps.description: Try DEXs, lending platforms, or NFT marketplaces built on Blast to boost your point multiplier.

name: Celestia
description: Celestia is a modular data availability network. Developers deploying rollups and users staking TIA may qualify for future incentives.

steps.title: Acquire TIA tokens
steps.description: Buy TIA on major exchanges (Binance, OKX) and transfer to a Cosmos-compatible wallet like Keplr.

steps.title: Stake TIA
steps.description: Stake your TIA through validators to earn rewards and participate in network security.

steps.title: Use Celestia rollups
steps.description: Interact with rollups built on Celestia's DA layer. Check ecosystem page for active projects.

name: Fuel Network
description: Fuel is the fastest modular execution layer. Testnet users and developers may qualify for airdrops when mainnet launches.

steps.title: Set up Fuel wallet
steps.description: Install the Fuel wallet browser extension and connect to the testnet.

steps.title: Get testnet tokens
steps.description: Use the Fuel faucet to claim testnet tokens for transactions.

steps.title: Use Fuel testnet dApps
steps.description: Try DEXs, NFT minting, or other testnet apps. Make diverse transactions.
steps.tips: Testnet activity often rewarded in crypto

steps.title: Learn Sway (optional)
steps.description: Fuel's smart contract language. Developers deploying contracts may get higher rewards.

name: Shardeum
description: Shardeum is an EVM-based sharded blockchain. Testnet users may receive SHM token airdrops upon mainnet launch.

steps.title: Add Shardeum testnet to MetaMask
steps.description: Configure your MetaMask to connect to Shardeum Sphinx testnet.

steps.title: Claim testnet SHM
steps.description: Use the Shardeum faucet to get free testnet tokens.

steps.title: Use testnet dApps
steps.description: Swap, mint NFTs, or provide liquidity on testnet DEXs. Generate transaction history.
